state.701: Low pressure pressostat or low-pressure sensor in the cooling circle has responded (L/W) or for longer than 20 seconds (S/W).
state.702: Only possible for L/W devices: Low pressure in the cooling circle has responded. After some time, automated HP restart.
state.703: Only possible for L/W devices: If the heat pump is running and the temperature in flow is < 5 degC, antifreeze is detected.
state.704: Maximum temperature in the hot gas cooling circle exceeded. Automatic HP restart after hh:mm.
state.705: Only possible for L/W devices: Motor protection has responded.
state.706: Option only possible for S/W- or W/W devices: Motor protection of the brine or well water circulating pump or the compressor has responded.
state.707: Break or short-circuit of the coding bridge in HP after the first switch-on.
state.708: Break or short-circuit in the return sensor.
state.709: Break or short-circuit in the flow sensor. No fault shutdown for S/W- or W/W devices.
state.710: Break or short-circuit in the hot gas sensor of the cooling circle.
state.711: Break or short-circuit in the external temperature sensor. No fault shutdown. Fixed value to -5 degC.
state.712: Break or short-circuit in the domestic hot water sensor. No fault shutdown.
state.713: Break or short-circuit in the heat source sensor (inlet).
state.714: Check thermal application limit of the HP. Domestic hot water off for hh:mm. Fault only triggers if the compressor is running.
state.715: High pressure in the cooling circle has responded. After some time, automated HP restart.
state.716: High pressure pressostat in the cooling circle has responded several times.
state.717: Flow switch for W/W devices has responded during the pre-rinsing time or operation.
state.718: Only possible for L/W devices: Outside temperature has exceeded permissible maximum value. Automatic HP restart after hh:mm.
state.719: Only possible for L/W devices: Outside temperature has fallen below the permissible minimum value. Automatic HP restart after hh:mm.
state.720: Option only possible for S/W- or W/W devices: Temperature at evaporation outlet has fallen below the safety value on the HS side several times. Automatic HP restart after hh:mm.
state.721: Low pressure pressostat or low-pressure sensor in the cooling circle has responded. After some time, automated HP restart (S/W and W/W).
state.722: Temperature spread in the heating mode is negative (=erroneous).
state.723: Temperature spread in the domestic hot water mode is negative (=erroneous).
state.724: Temperature spread in the heating circle is > 15 K during defrosting (=danger of frost).
state.725: Domestic hot water faulty, desired tank temperature is fallen below substantially.
state.726: Break or short-circuit in the mixing circle sensor.
state.727: Brine pressure pressostat has responded during the pre-rinsing time or during operation.
state.728: Break or short-circuit in the heat source sensor at the HS outlet.
state.729: Compressor without power after switching on.
state.730: The screed heating program could not reach an FL temperature level in the specified time interval. Screed heating program continues running.
state.731: The temperature required for thermal disinfection could not be reached within the set switching times.
state.732: The heating water temperature of 16 degC has been fallen short of several times.
state.733: Fault input of the impressed current anode has responded.
state.734: Error 733 present for more than two weeks and domestic hot water is locked.
state.735: Only possible with installed expansion board: Break or short-circuit in the sensor "External energy source".
state.736: Only possible with installed expansion board: Break or short-circuit in the "solar collector" sensor.
state.737: Only possible with installed expansion board: Break or short-circuit in the "solar tank" sensor.
state.738: Only possible with installed expansion board: Break or short-circuit in the "mixing circle 2" sensor.
state.739: Only possible with installed expansion board: Break or short-circuit in the "mixing circle 3" sensor.
state.750: Break or short-circuit in the external return sensor.
state.752: Phase-sequence relay or flow switch has responded.
state.755: A slave has not responded for more than 5 minutes.
state.756: A master has not responded for more than 5 minutes.
state.757: Low-pressure pressostat in the W/W-appliance has triggered either repeatedly or for more than 20 seconds.
state.758: Five times in a row, defrosting has either lasted longer than 10 minutes or was terminated with a feed temperature of < 10 degC.
state.759: Unable to correctly carry out thermal disinfection 5 times in succession.
state.760: Defrosting ended 5 times in succession by maximum time (strong wind impinges on evaporator).
state.766: Operation for 5 minutes outside the compressor's functional range.
state.767: STB of the heating element has been activated.
state.769: After 10 sec compressor runtime excessively low flow.
state.770: Overheating lies below the limit value for a lengthy period.
state.771: Overheating lies above the limit value for a lengthy period.
state.776: Compressor operates outside its use limits for a lengthy period.
state.781: Liquid temperature sensor upstream of the ex-valve is defective.
state.782: Suction gas EVI temperature sensor is defective.
state.783: Connection between the SEC board and the inverter is disrupted.
state.785: Error found in the SEC board.
state.786: Connection between SEC board and HZ/IO is disrupted by the SEC board.
state.789: Control unit unable to find coding. Either the LIN connection is interrupted or the coding resistor is not detected.
state.790: Fault in the power supply of the inverter / compressor.
state.791: The control panel has no ModBus communication with the inverter for at least 10 seconds or 10 communication packets to the inverter were lost. Reset automatically.
state.792: Unable to find a master board or any configuration.
state.793: Temperature sensor fault in the inverter. Internal inverter temperature too high at least 5x within 24 h.
state.796: Safety Input was triggered. Case 1: Inverter malfunction. Reset automatically. Case 2: High-pressure pressostats in refrigerating circuit have triggered. Reset automatically. Case 3: Only LWDV malfunction message caused by voltage fluctuations exceeding the valid standard.
state.797: Heating rod regulating is not supported.
state.798: No ModBus communication with the fan for at least 10 seconds. Reset automatically.
state.799: No ModBus communication with the ASB board for at least 10 seconds. Reset automatically.
state.800: Shutdown is triggered when desuperheater temperature >= 80 degC. Device is switched off and D0_Pause is written in shutdowns. Device is released again for operation after 2 hours. If the shutdown occurs 5 times within 24 hours, error 800 is written to the fault memory.
state.802: Shutdown will be triggered when temperature in the electrical control box >= 80 degC. If the temperature falls below 70 degC, then the heat pump will start up again. Reset automatically.
state.803: Error 802 tripped 3 times within 24 hours. Manual reset required. If the temperature in the electrical switch box is still >= 80 degC, the error will be triggered again immediately.
state.806: The SEC-board has no ModBus communication for at least 10 seconds or query has failed 10 times in a row. Reset automatically.
state.807: All possible ModBus communication faults with unit components for the respective unit are present simultaneously for at least 10 seconds. Reset automatically.

state.701: Check HP for leakage, switching point pressure state, defrosting and T-outd.min.
state.702: Check HP for leakage, switching point pressure state, defrosting and T-outd.min.
state.703: Check HP power, defrost valve and heating system.
state.704: Check coolant quantity, evaporation, overheating flow, return and HS-min.
state.705: Check set value and ventilator / BCP.
state.707: Coding resistance in HP, check plug and connection line.
state.708: Check return sensor, plug and connection line.
state.709: Check flow sensor, plug and connection line.
state.710: Check hot gas sensor, plug and connection line.
state.711: Check external temperature sensor, plug and connection line.
state.712: Check domestic hot water sensor, plug and connection line.
state.713: Check heat source sensor, plug and connection line.
state.714: Check flow of domestic hot water, heat exchanger, domestic hot water temperature and circulation pump.
state.715: Check flow of HW, overflows, temperature and condensation.
state.716: Check flow of HW, overflows, temperature and condensation.
state.717: Check flow, switching point for DFS, filter, air clearance.
state.718: Check outside temperature and set value.
state.719: Check outside temperature and set value.
state.720: Check flow, filter, air clearance, temperature.
state.721: Check switching point of the pressostat, flow on HS side.
state.722: Check function and location of the flow and return sensor.
state.723: Check function and location of the flow and return sensor.
state.724: Check function and location of the flow and return sensor, HCP capacity, overflows and heating circles.
state.725: Check circulating pump DHW, tank filling, shutoff move and 3-way valve. Ventilate heating water and DHW system.
state.726: Check mixing circle sensor, plug and connection line.
state.727: Check brine pressure and brine pressure pressostat.
state.728: Check heat source sensor, plug and connection line.
state.730: Check power demand during screed heating.
state.732: Check mixer and heating circulation pump.
state.733: Check connection line between anode and potentiostat. Fill DHW tank.
state.734: Acknowledge error in order to release domestic hot water preparation again. Rectify 733.
state.735: Check sensor "External energy source", plug and connection line.
state.736: Check "solar collector" sensor, plug and connection line.
state.737: Check "solar tank" sensor, plug and connection line.
state.738: Check "mixing circle 2" sensor, plug and connection line.
state.739: Check "mixing circle 3" sensor, plug and connection line.
state.750: Check external return sensor, plug and connection line.
state.751: Check rotary field and phase-sequence relay.
state.755: Check network connection, switch, and IP addresses. Perform HP search if necessary.
state.756: Check network connection, switch, and IP addresses. Perform HP search if necessary.
state.757: If this malfunction occurs three times, the installation can only be cleared again by authorised service personnel!
state.758: Check flow rate. Check flow sensor.
state.759: Check setting of second heat generator and safety temperature limiter.
state.760: Protect the fan and evaporator from strong wind.
state.765: When switching on for the first time, check rotary field, otherwise phone customer service.
state.767: Check the heating element and press the fuse back in.
state.768: Check hydraulics, check pump, check flow.
state.770: Check the temperature sensor, pressure sensor and expansion valve.
state.771: Check the temperature sensor, pressure sensor, fill quantity and expansion valve.
state.777: Check the expansion valve, connection cable and if applicable the SEC board.
state.778: Check the sensor, connector and connection cable.
state.779: Check the sensor, connector and connection cable.
state.780: Check the sensor, connector and connection cable.
state.781: Check the sensor, connector and connection cable.
state.782: Check the sensor, connector and connection cable.
state.783: Check the connection cable, interference suppression capacitors and wiring.
state.784: Disconnect the complete system from the power supply for 2 minutes. If it occurs again, check the inverter and compressor.
state.786: Check the HZ/IO - SEC board wiring.
state.787: Acknowledge fault. If an error occurs repeatedly, phone the authorised service personnel (customer service).
state.789: Check the connection cable LIN / coding resistor.
state.790: Check the wiring, inverter and compressor.
state.791: Check the Modbus wiring of inverter.
state.792: Check the coding connector on the LIN board(s).
state.796: Case 1: Check inverter. Remedy fault. Case 2: Check HW throughflow, overflow, flow temperature sensor and high-pressure sensor. Remedy fault. Case 3: It must be turned off and resecured manually.
state.800: Remove energy from desuperheater memory. The machine can be restarted as soon as the temperature falls < 80 degC.
state.802: Check fan for correct function. Check connection cable. Check sensor. Check electrical control box openings for blockages.
state.803: Check fan for correct function. Check connection cable. Check sensor. Check electrical control box openings for blockages.
state.807: Check ModBus interface on the control unit, connection cable to ModBus distributor and ModBus distributor itself. Check Modbus wiring.

state.0: heating curve control - Controlled by outside temperature

user.title: Configure options for {name}
user.description: Settings for the Luxtronik heat pump {name}.

data.ha_sensor_indoor_temperature: Sensor ID for the indoor temperature

data_description.ha_sensor_indoor_temperature:
A thermostat for heating control is created in Home Assistant. The actual temperature for this is set by a Home Assistant sensor.
If Luxtronik is connected to a hardware room thermostat, then this field should be left empty.
data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the heat pump for new data.

parameter_not_writable.message: Parameter {parameter} rejected — only parameters with prefixes {prefixes} are writable

ambiguous_write_target.message: Multiple Luxtronik heat pumps are configured ({count} loaded) — specify device_id or config_entry_id to select which one to write to

invalid_write_target.message: Could not resolve a loaded Luxtronik heat pump for target {target}

invalid_timer_schedule.message: Invalid timer schedule "{value}": expected "HH:MM-HH:MM" entries separated by "/", with at most {max_rows} entries

write_confirmation_mismatch.message: Luxtronik heat pump did not confirm the written value(s): {details}

write_confirmation_unavailable.message: Wrote {parameters} to the Luxtronik heat pump, but the confirming refresh failed — the result could not be confirmed

connection_failed.title: Cannot connect to Luxtronik heat pump
connection_failed.description:
The integration could not connect to the Luxtronik heat pump at **{host}:{port}**.

Error: `{error}`

Please check that the heat pump is powered on, the network connection is working, and the host/port are correct. You can update the connection settings via the **Reconfigure** option in the integration menu.
